# Renaming a user onto a name that already exists is rejected, leaving both
# users intact.

exec git init
exec git config user.email test@sesam.dev
exec git config user.name 'Sesam Test'

exec sesam init --user admin
exec git add -A
exec git commit -m 'init sesam'

exec sesam tell --user bob --recipient $BOB_PUBKEY --group dev

# Renaming bob onto the existing admin must fail.
! exec sesam user rename bob admin
stderr 'already exists'

# Both users survived the rejected rename.
exec sesam user list
stdout 'bob'
stdout 'admin'
exec sesam verify
